backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Product, Sponsor, BackendOrder, etc.) and CRUD endpoints for products, orders, sponsors, and users, including placeOrder, getOrders, addProduct, editProduct, deleteProduct, and category filtering.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (with separate nextProductId/nextSponsorId/nextOrderId and OldOrder format) into the new unified NewActor shape with a single nextId and BackendOrder structure.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (multi-step checkout, placeOrder/getOrders hooks, admin Orders tab) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference overview of the frontend codebase structure and responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, border, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'The Gaming Company™' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TSX entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up QueryClient, CartProvider, and ErrorBoundary, and renders a layout with a sticky header, desktop sidebar navigation, and view routing between store, cart, checkout, and admin pages.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: Class-based React error boundary that catches runtime errors in the component tree and displays a fallback UI with an error message and reload button.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a single product with image, category badge, name, description, and price, and provides an 'Add to Cart' button using the CartContext.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: Form component for creating or editing a product, featuring a smart auto-fill lookup table that populates image, description, category, and price for well-known gaming products.
frontend/src/components/SponsorCard.tsx: Renders a sponsor's logo, name, and description in a card layout with a fallback placeholder image and an 'Official Sponsor' label.
frontend/src/components/SponsorForm.tsx: Form component for adding or editing a sponsor, with fields for name, logo URL, and description, supporting both create and update modes.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: Provides a React context for shopping cart state with add, remove, update, and clear operations, persisting cart data to localStorage with BigInt serialization handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations (products, sponsors, orders) including category mapping between frontend display names and backend enum values, and CRUD mutations with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up a dark gaming theme using Tailwind with custom OKLCH color variables, imports gaming fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Inter), and defines utility classes for neon glow effects and card hover animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider providers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page with a password gate (hardcoded PIN) and tabbed interface for managing products, sponsors, and viewing orders, using dialog-based forms for CRUD operations.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with quantity controls and removal, plus an order summary sidebar with a checkout button and continue shopping navigation.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page with a customer details form (name, email, phone, address) that validates input, submits an order via the usePlaceOrder mutation, and shows a success confirmation screen.
frontend/src/pages/StorePage.tsx: Renders the main store page with a hero banner, category header, and a grid of ProductCard or SponsorCard components based on the selected category. Fetches all products and sponsors via custom hooks, filters client-side by category, and shows skeleton loaders while loading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining custom gaming-themed fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani), OKLCH-based color tokens, glow box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 17) for 'The Gaming Company™' store site, documenting architectural notes, existing features, and known issues such as broken product persistence and non-functional sidebar navigation.
